brooks.blurb: Icomply installs and maintains Brooks smoke-control and AOV equipment across the North West, from multi-storey residential to commercial cores. Our engineers handle commissioning, planned servicing and reactive call-outs to BS 9991 and EN 12101, with full certification for landlords and FM teams. Trade actuator spares, panel batteries and control-room consumables are available from our Stockport shop for contractors working on Brooks systems.
brooks.seo_desc: Brooks AOV install, service & certification in the North West. Trade actuators & panel spares from Icomply Stockport. Free quotes for FM & trade.
brooks.seo_keywords: Brooks, Brooks AOV, Brooks smoke control, Brooks installation North West, Brooks service Manchester, Brooks actuator spares, Brooks certification, Brooks trade shop Stockport, AOV maintenance Greater Manchester

products.blurb: Trade consumables for Brooks chain and spindle actuators — ideal for planned smoke-control maintenance.

products.blurb: Replacement batteries, fuses and keys for Brooks AOV control panels on North West estates.

c-tec.blurb: C-Tec fire alarm panels and devices are a staple on North West commercial and residential sites — Icomply designs, installs and services them to BS 5839. We support new XFP and ZFP projects, annual inspections and emergency repairs, issuing clear certification for insurers and responsible persons. Our trade counter stocks panel batteries, call points, detectors and engineer keys so FM teams and electrical contractors can keep C-Tec systems compliant.
c-tec.seo_desc: C-Tec fire alarm install, BS 5839 service & certs across Manchester & the North West. Trade panel kits & detectors from Icomply.

cambric.blurb: Icomply is a North West installer and service partner for Cambric smoke ventilation and AOV controls used in residential cores and mixed-use schemes. We commission new systems, complete scheduled maintenance and rectify faults to BS 9991 / EN 12101 with documented certification. Contractors and facilities managers can source Cambric actuator parts, interface modules and panel consumables from our trade shop in Stockport.
cambric.seo_desc: Cambric AOV install, maintenance & EN 12101 certification in the North West. Trade actuators & panel parts from Icomply Stockport.

caretech.blurb: Caretech nurse call systems keep care homes and healthcare settings responsive — Icomply installs, expands and services them across Greater Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire. Work is delivered with HTM 08-03 guidance in mind, including call-point testing, panel health checks and certification for care providers and estates teams. Pear leads, call points, overdoor lights and panel batteries are stocked for trade and in-house engineers.
caretech.seo_desc: Caretech nurse call install, service & HTM-aligned certification in the North West. Trade call points & pear leads from Icomply.

cdvi.blurb: CDVI access control — from standalone readers to networked controllers — is installed and maintained by Icomply across the North West. We handle door hardware, credentials, timed access profiles and handover certification for offices, residential blocks and industrial sites. Trade packs of readers, fobs, exit devices and PSU spares are available from our Stockport counter for locksmiths and security contractors.

clear-com.blurb: Clear-Com intercoms are trusted in theatres, broadcast, venues and industrial sites — Icomply installs and services them throughout the North West. From beltpacks and party-line kits to digital matrix stations, we provide commissioning, fault-finding and scheduled maintenance with clear handover documentation. Master-station accessories, headset spares and door-station modules are available for trade and in-house AV teams.

clevertronics.blurb: Clevertronics emergency lighting — including self-test and monitored ranges — is installed and tested by Icomply to BS 5266 across Greater Manchester and the wider North West. We cover new fit-outs, bulkhead replacements, exit signage and monthly/annual testing with full certification for duty holders. Trade packs of LED emergency fittings and battery modules help electrical contractors complete service rounds without delay.

click-scolmore.blurb: Click Scolmore wiring accessories and distribution gear are widely specified on North West domestic and light-commercial jobs — Icomply installs, upgrades and faults-finds them to BS 7671. From consumer unit replacements and circuit additions to full rewires, we provide testing, certification and aftercare for landlords, homeowners and contractors. Our trade shop stocks Click Scolmore breakers, faceplates, grid modules and install accessories for same-day collection.

colt.blurb: Colt is a leading name in smoke ventilation and climate control — Icomply installs, services and certifies Colt AOV and natural-ventilation systems across the North West. Our engineers cover louvres, roof vents, actuators and control panels to BS 9991 and EN 12101, supporting developers, housing providers and FM contracts. Trade actuator kits, weather seals and panel batteries are available for contractors maintaining Colt equipment on site.

comelit.blurb: Comelit video and audio door entry is a popular choice for UK apartment blocks and commercial entrances — Icomply designs, installs and maintains systems across Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire and Merseyside. We replace handsets, upgrade entrance panels, integrate access control and issue clear handover certification for freeholders and managing agents. Trade handsets, rain hoods, flush boxes and entrance modules are stocked for electrical and security contractors.
